ab: niqan kingl gnxalan mu kesun Pawan, cmhungi madis qyqeya klaali.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Pawan，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Pawan, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: muuyas miyan sapah ttgsaan ma, kmbarux ppatis, serus ma patis pptasan na gnxalan ka heya.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: mntexal, mndaha, mnteru, kbrexun daha qyqeya ka heya.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ani si naqah kbrexun qyqeya ka heya, ini prihi klaali.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: mhiti de ini mkpkbarux heya ka kana daha di.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: niqan kingal ali, mosa nami cyaw-yo kana nami.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: mkmaha psnganguc ka Pawan mkkesa nami moda eluw, ani si ga cmhungi madis we-sung-cu.
ch: 路途中，Pawan想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Pawan wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: smiling pkbarux gnxalan na ma, ini nami adis duri mesa kana ka dheya.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: asi lux lmingis snyexan na ka Pawan. Mseyang mesa, “Ma namu ini pkbarux wesungcu yaku kana namu!!”
ch: Pawan急的哭了出來。他生氣的說:「為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!」
en: Pawan burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: kesun peeyah gnxalan na, ado su naq ini adis ka isu ma, kbrexun su qyqeya de, ini su pririh klaali.
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: ini beyo mosa sapah pyasan so kusun ka Pawan nii, wada na prihun gnxalan na kana qyqeya knbrexan na di.
ch: 隔天上學，Pawan很早就到學校了，Pawan把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Pawan arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: ini ba klai kesun na dgnxalan na, maadis ku naq qyqeya bobo na di mesa, khwayun maku bale ka knbrexan namu qyqeya ka yaku berah na mesa duri.
ch: Pawan向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Pawan apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
